summary: Sprint 22 full testing: health/metrics endpoints, pagination, Bulk MI Generator, Auto-assign Template, Line Balancing. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend flows working correctly.

design_issues.screen: Assign Lini Hari Ini — Auto-assign banner
issues: auto-assign-apply-btn testid only appears after 'Cek Template Kemarin' is clicked (conditional render) — expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: supervisor@garment.com (staff_produksi) cannot access Portal Produksi — shows 'Tidak ada akses'. Only Portal Saya is accessible. If supervisors need Portal Produksi access, the role mapping in PortalShell.jsx needs to include staff_produksi.
Line Balancing: Balance Pabrik shows 0% because target_pcs are 0 in assignments — not a bug, just no data
test_credentials: admin@garment.com / Admin@123 used. supervisor@garment.com cannot access Portal Produksi.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 22 all features verified: (1) GET /api/health returns status:ok, db:connected, db_latency_ms. (2) GET /api/metrics returns collections counts. (3) Pagination works for /api/rahaza/employees?limit=5 and work-orders?limit=3. (4) Bulk MI Generator at Eksekusi > Bulk Material Issue — page loads with WO selection + Hasil Preview & Generate panel, data-testid=bulk-mi-page and bmi-preview-btn present. (5) Line Balancing at Monitoring > Line Balancing — shows 3 lines (Line A, B, C), summary cards with Total Lini/Total Operator/Balance Pabrik. (6) Auto-assign: Assign Lini Hari Ini shows Auto-assign banner with Cek Template Kemarin button (data-testid=auto-assign-preview-btn), clicking it shows yesterday's template with apply button. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sprint22.py. NOTE: supervisor@garment.com (staff_produksi role) does NOT have access to Portal Produksi — only admin can access it.
rca_of_issues: supervisor role (staff_produksi) not mapped to Portal Produksi access in PortalShell.jsx. This may be intentional but contradicts test requirements that ask to test with supervisor@garment.com.
